{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230554380E108EBA34FFCA6BCBA7"}"},"total":546},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562484236558746393","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真是一本好书！人物生动真实，三个阶层的人性都体现的淋漓尽致。老头子给大志的遗产很多，那是对儿子情感亏欠的一种弥补更是对失去的再看看老头子的恋人的一种补偿。而老太太的做法也非常好，给大志一个长期有效的一种生活保障。如果真的像老头子一样给大志那么多遗产，大志的日子不见得就会幸福！","text_exts":[{"e":81,"s":78,"text":"老太太","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%80%81%E5%A4%AA%E5%A4%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774216478CA6BCBA7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227562484236558746393%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227543529542120393753%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%80%81%E5%A4%AA%E5%A4%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760781009,"group_id":"7543529542120393753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4gdZZM/TcoKeq3lCSYz+XLpjWy3fkQnpctAgUUVtoDG","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2256639149744024","user_name":"大云帝国的龙鼎天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2256639149744024","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7543529542120393753","book_info":{"abstract":"女儿郝思嘉为了追求理想，体质内的工作说辞就辞；婆婆王媖患上老年痴呆，小姑子郝恩赏不想照顾，丈夫郝贤却想着孝心外包；作为全职主妇的王雅丽，刚把女儿培养成人，又要照顾老年痴呆的婆婆。
而郝恩赏也自顾不暇，丈夫黄晓杰中年失业，儿子黄清北成绩吊车尾。
正当两家人愁眉莫展之际，王媖又突然冒出了一个私生子……
孝心外包、养老矛盾、全职主妇、中年失业、子女就业……
中式家庭的一地鸡毛，中年夫妻的生活艰辛！
但哪怕生活一地鸡毛，也要踩着鸡毛继续前行。
翻开本书，看他们如何从争吵与埋怨的一地鸡毛中走向理解与包容的幸福生活。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/b536425cd51060b74e2bfcd39135059a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"汪二峤 著","author_id":"","book_id":"7543529542120393753","book_name":"中年夫妻：中式家庭的一地鸡毛","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"53.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":2,"name":"都市生活","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=2&name=都市生活&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599877636285795352","read_count":"47196","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"473518"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"249","tags":"精品小说,都市生活","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b536425cd51060b74e2bfcd39135059a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400478&x-signature=1DlIuZh0NXqc6%2F9huT1J%2FYYktuI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"259"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230554380E108EBA34FFCA6BCBA7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":93023,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":93094,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10744},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580713679345091353","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很真实，贴近生活，三观很正，作者感情细腻，人生经验丰富，读懂这本书，也相当于读懂了一半的人生，虽然标题是一地鸡毛，但是里面写的家庭生活超越了国内绝大部分的家庭，表达了父慈子孝家庭才能顺风顺水的理念，良好的家风抵万金……","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":54,"text":"一地鸡毛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E5%9C%B0%E9%B8%A1%E6%AF%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774
